props.name: text
props.description: The text to be displayed with the shiny effect.

props.name: color
props.description: The base color of the text.

props.name: shineColor
props.description: The color of the shine/highlight effect.

props.name: speed
props.description: Duration of one animation cycle in seconds.

props.name: delay
props.description: Pause duration (in seconds) between animation cycles.

props.name: spread
props.description: The angle (in degrees) of the gradient spread.

props.name: yoyo
props.description: If true, the animation reverses direction instead of looping.

props.name: pauseOnHover
props.description: Pauses the animation when the user hovers over the text.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the shiny effect when set to true.

props.name: className
props.description: Adds custom classes to the root element.
